about.label: About the place
about.title: Your oceanfront retreat
about.text: Casa Bawi is a modern, sun-drenched apartment just steps from the beach in Puerto Escondido, Oaxaca. With room for up to 6 guests, two air-conditioned bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace overlooking the Pacific, it's the perfect base to unwind, catch waves, and soak in the Oaxacan coast. Made for couples, families, surfers, and remote workers who crave comfort, calm, and the rhythm of the sea.
about.highlight_1_text: Just steps to the sand — fall asleep to the sound of the waves.
about.highlight_2_text: Full kitchen, A/C in every bedroom, Starlink WiFi, and all the essentials.
about.highlight_3_text: A secure building with elevator access in a quiet, residential neighborhood.

location.label: Location
location.title: How to find us
location.text: Casa Bawi sits in the Tamarindos neighborhood of Puerto Escondido, Oaxaca — one of the quietest and safest pockets of the city. Just steps from the shoreline, you'll hear the waves from your terrace. It's the perfect home base for exploring nearby beaches, local restaurants, and world-class surf breaks.
location.address_line1: Calle Fresnos y Nogales, Col. Tamarindos

booking.label: Book
booking.title: Reserve your stay
booking.text: Ready for paradise? Send us a WhatsApp message to check availability and book directly. Fast replies and personal attention guaranteed.
booking.whatsapp_message: Hi, I'm interested in booking the Casa Bawi apartment in Puerto Escondido. Could you share more details?
